description: The webhook notification payload delivered by Dynatrace when a problem lifecycle event occurs. Contains both summary fields for quick processing and the full ProblemDetailsJSON for detailed analysis.

ProblemID.description: The human-readable problem identifier displayed in the Dynatrace UI, e.g., P-123456.

ProblemTitle.description: The title of the problem generated by the Davis AI engine, describing the nature of the detected anomaly.

ProblemURL.description: The full URL to the problem detail page in the Dynatrace UI, allowing recipients to navigate directly to the problem.

ProblemSeverity.description: The severity level classification of the problem.

ProblemStatus.description: The current lifecycle status of the problem at the time of notification.

ImpactedEntities.description: The list of monitored entities that are experiencing service degradation as a result of the problem.

ImpactedEntityNames.description: A comma-separated string of display names for all impacted entities, for use in simple notification templates.

Tags.description: A comma-separated string of tags applied to the impacted entities, for use in routing or filtering notification handlers.

State.description: The state of the problem notification. OPEN for new or ongoing problems, RESOLVED for resolved problems, MERGED for merged problems.

name: ProblemNotificationPayload
